findings.title: North Star Metric: Dashboard Load Time
findings.description: The North Star metric for PageSpeed is the 95th percentile load time of the dashboard, which directly impacts user experience and satisfaction.
assumptions: Improving dashboard load time will enhance user satisfaction and reduce support tickets.

evidence.excerpt: Dashboard load time regressed from 1.2s to 4.8s after v3.2 deploy

recommendations: Focus on optimizing the dashboard load time to improve user experience.

metadata.measurement_method: P95 load time measurement from performance monitoring tools

findings.title: Primary KPI: API Latency
findings.description: The 95th percentile latency of the API, which is crucial for backend performance and user interactions.
assumptions: Lower API latency will lead to better overall application performance.
recommendations: Monitor and optimize API latency to ensure it remains within acceptable limits.

metadata.measurement_method: P95 latency measurement from API monitoring tools

findings.title: Guardrail Metric: Error Rate
findings.description: The percentage of errors occurring in the application, which should not exceed a certain threshold to maintain service quality.
assumptions: Keeping the error rate low is essential for user trust and satisfaction.
recommendations: Implement monitoring to ensure error rates do not exceed 0.4%.

findings.title: Instrumentation Gap: Performance Regression Detection
findings.description: Currently, there is no automated performance regression detection in the CI pipeline, which could prevent future regressions.
assumptions: Automated performance checks will catch regressions before they reach production.

evidence.excerpt: Implement performance regression detection in CI pipeline

recommendations: Develop and implement a performance benchmarking suite in the CI pipeline.

findings.title: Implement Real-time Status Page
findings.description: Creating a public status page to provide customers with real-time performance metrics and historical data.
assumptions: Customers will benefit from visibility into system performance.

evidence.excerpt: Build a public status page that shows real-time p50/p95/p99 latencies, error rates, and uptime.

recommendations: Prioritize the development of a public status page.

summary: The analysis identifies the North Star metric as the dashboard load time, with critical primary KPIs such as API latency and guardrail metrics like error rate. There are significant gaps in performance regression detection and opportunities for enhancing customer visibility through a status page.
